constraints: Always-on MetaBlooms governance is mandatory baseline; cartridge governance is additive.
Do not promote FL17 as baseline in this stage.
Do not overwrite active runtime state or tracker-working target files.
Approved FL17 progression is evidence only until later reconciliation/repair.
Preserve FL16 blocked-promotion semantics separately from FL17 export PASS semantics.

decisions: Target tracker-working OS remains authoritative active baseline.
FL17 files are copied only into a quarantine namespace.
Conflict authority files are imported as snapshots only, not as active replacements.
FL17 tracker hook imported as evidence only; activation deferred to tracker repair stage.
